title: Optimize Modpack for [ Manab ]
description: Optimize Modpacks for Manab which focus on His bad PC. [ICON NOT MINE IT MANAB]
body:
# Optimized Modpack for Manab

![ABOUT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bbb2c1229ed64e5ec5ff3745dbb95416b479ab5_0.webp)

A lightweight, performance-focused modpack *custom-built* for **Manab’s potato-tier PC**. Designed to reduce lag, boost FPS, and finally give him a fighting chance — because let’s face it, he really needs one.

**Based on [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)**, this pack is tweaked and tailored with extra care. Expect weekly updates with new mods, improvements, and bug fixes.

---

![WHAT-WE-HAS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b9612f946641164359ff9739ff4fab14b1711db_0.webp)

### Features

- **Performance boost - Sodium**  
- **Specifically built for Manab because his pc bad**  
- **Updates & improvements**  
- **More mods coming soon** i hope so.
